proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing 2,000 hours a year on proposal creation. Here's how.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting proposals is manual and slow. With our system, generate a polished proposal in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are not just inefficiencies; they are ongoing losses for Gmail.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Each proposal takes hours to draft. For Gmail, that's thousands of hours not spent on innovation and improvement.

problems.title: Lost Opportunities
problems.description: Every hour spent on writing is an hour not spent on closing deals. Gmail misses the chance to onboard more customers.

problems.title: Inconsistency
problems.description: Manually created proposals vary in quality. This inconsistency can cost Gmail potential client trust and future revenue.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled employees to draft proposals is not cost-effective. Gmail incurs high expenses that could be reduced.

problems.title: Delayed Responses
problems.description: Manual proposal creation delays responses to potential clients. This delay can lead to lost deals and decreased satisfaction.

problems.title: Reputation Risk
problems.description: Errors in proposals damage Gmail's reputation. This damage can lead to lost credibility and customer trust.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI automation system is the solution to replace these losses with efficiency and effectiveness.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals are manually crafted over hours or days. Our system completes them in under a minute, saving time.

solutions.title: Brand Consistency
solutions.description: Inconsistency plagues manual proposals. Our system ensures every proposal is on-brand, every time.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: High labor costs are a burden. Our system reduces the need for manual labor, cutting unnecessary expenses.

solutions.title: Faster Client Response
solutions.description: Currently, delays in proposal creation slow client responses. With our system, respond instantly and close deals faster.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Errors in manual proposals hurt reputation. Our system ensures every proposal is error-free, protecting Gmail's image.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Communication with Gmail's Efficient Email Solutions.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Partner with Gmail to streamline your communications, reduce spam, and increase storage efficiency.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is losing potential due to inefficient communication systems.

problems.title: Inefficient Email Handling
problems.description: Every minute spent sorting through spam is productivity lost. Employees waste hours weekly managing unwanted emails.

problems.title: Limited Storage Capacity
problems.description: Running out of storage forces you to delete important emails. This loss of data can affect client relations and decision-making.

problems.title: Email Access Issues
problems.description: Employees unable to access emails on-the-go miss critical updates. This can delay project timelines and decision-making.

problems.title: High Security Risks
problems.description: Unsecure email systems are a gateway for data breaches. Each breach can cost you millions in recovery and lost trust.

problems.title: Poor User Experience
problems.description: Complicated interfaces slow down your team's productivity. Each moment of confusion is a loss in operational efficiency.

problems.title: Lack of Collaboration Tools
problems.description: Without integrated tools, collaboration is hampered. Every disjointed workflow is a missed opportunity for synergy.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Gmail offers strategic solutions to counter these losses.

solutions.title: Efficient Email Management
solutions.description: Gmail's advanced filters keep spam at bay, ensuring your team focuses on what matters.

solutions.title: 15 GB Storage
solutions.description: With generous storage, never worry about deleting important emails again. Keep all your communications intact.

solutions.title: Mobile Access
solutions.description: Gmail provides seamless access to emails on any device, keeping your team connected everywhere.

solutions.title: Secure Infrastructure
solutions.description: Gmail's security features protect your data, reducing risks and securing your communications.

metrics.label: Uptime for email access across devices.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Gmail stands out as your partner with efficient email solutions.

whyUsCards.title: Global Reach
whyUsCards.description: Gmail supports a vast network, ensuring your communication is always global and reliable.

whyUsCards.title: Professional Tools
whyUsCards.description: Our suite includes a range of tools designed to enhance productivity and collaboration.

whyUsCards.title: Advanced Search
whyUsCards.description: Find any email in seconds with Gmail's powerful search capabilities.

whyUsCards.title: Custom Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We tailor our offerings to fit Acme Corp's unique communication needs.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet your dedicated team at Gmail.

team.name: there
team.bio: With years of experience, I lead strategy and client relationships to ensure your success with Gmail.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Planning
process.description: Understanding Acme Corp's needs and planning the integration.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Setting up Gmail solutions tailored to your needs.

process.title: Training & Support
process.description: Ensuring your team is comfortable with the new system.
